101.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban, the freed servant of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'When a Muslim man visits his Muslim brother, he remains in the garden of Paradise.'
101.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban, bekas budak Rasulullah ﷺ, bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika seorang laki-laki muslim mengunjungi saudaranya yang muslim, ia berada di taman surga.'

102.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Who will guarantee me not to ask anyone for anything, and I will guarantee him Paradise?' Thawban said: 'I will.' And he never asked anyone for anything.
102.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Siapa yang menjamin kepadaku untuk tidak meminta apa pun kepada siapapun, dan aku akan menjamin surga baginya?' Tsauban berkata: 'Aku.' Dan ia tidak pernah meminta apa pun kepada siapapun.'

103.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When a man visits his brother, he remains in the gardens of Paradise until he returns.'
103.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika seorang laki-laki mengunjungi saudaranya, ia berada di taman-taman surga hingga ia kembali.'

104.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever follows a funeral will have a qirat of reward, and whoever witnesses its burial will have two qirats.' He was asked: 'What are the two qirats?' He said: 'The smaller of them is like mount Uhud.'
104.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa mengikuti jenazah, maka baginya satu qirat pahala, dan barangsiapa menyaksikan penguburannya, maka baginya dua qirat.' Ditanyakan: 'Apakah dua qirat itu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Yang paling kecil di antaranya seperti gunung Uhud.'

105.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that Madan asked him about the best deed to bring him closer to Allah. He said: 'I asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about that, and he said: Hold fast to prostrating much, for you will not prostrate to Allah once without Allah raising you one degree thereby and removing from you one sin.' Madan said: 'I then met Abu al-Darda and asked him, and he told me the same as Thawban had told me.'
105.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Ma'dan bertanya kepadanya tentang amal terbaik yang dapat mendekatkannya kepada Allah. Ia berkata: 'Aku bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang itu, dan beliau bersabda: Perbanyaklah sujud, karena kamu tidak akan sujud kepada Allah sekali pun melainkan Allah akan mengangkatmu satu derajat dengannya dan menghapus satu dosa darimu.' Ma'dan berkata: 'Kemudian aku bertemu Abu al-Darda dan bertanya kepadanya, dan ia menceritakan kepadaku hal yang sama seperti yang Tsauban ceritakan kepadaku.'

106.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Be upright and you will not be able to count all the reward. Know that the best of your deeds is prayer, and none will maintain wudu except a believer.'
106.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Istiqamahlah dan kamu tidak akan mampu menghitung semua pahalanya. Ketahuilah bahwa sebaik-baik amal kalian adalah shalat, dan tidak ada yang menjaga wudu kecuali seorang mukmin.'

107.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Any woman who asks her husband for divorce without good reason — the fragrance of Paradise is forbidden to her.'
107.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Wanita mana pun yang meminta cerai dari suaminya tanpa alasan yang baik — maka harum surga diharamkan baginya.'

108.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The best dinar is a dinar a man spends on his family, a dinar he spends on his riding animal in the path of Allah, or a dinar he spends on his companions in the path of Allah.'
108.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Dinar terbaik adalah dinar yang dinafkahkan seseorang untuk keluarganya, dinar yang ia nafkahkan untuk tunggangannya di jalan Allah, atau dinar yang ia nafkahkan untuk teman-temannya di jalan Allah.'

109.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ vomited and broke his fast. He said: I met Thawban in the mosque of Damascus and asked him about it, and he said: 'I was the one who poured the Prophet's ﷺ water for wudu after it.'
109.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ muntah dan membatalkan puasanya. Ia berkata: Aku bertemu Tsauban di masjid Damaskus dan bertanya kepadanya tentang hal itu, dan ia berkata: 'Akulah yang menuangkan air wudu untuk Rasulullah ﷺ setelahnya.'

110.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came across a man performing cupping in Ramadan and said: 'Both the cupper and the one being cupped have broken their fast.'
110.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melewati seorang laki-laki yang sedang membekam di bulan Ramadan dan bersabda: 'Orang yang membekam dan orang yang dibekam keduanya telah membatalkan puasanya.'

111.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ sent out an expedition and they were afflicted by the cold. When they came back to the Prophet ﷺ, they complained about what had struck them from the cold. He commanded them to wipe over their head wrappings and their footwear.
111.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengirim sebuah pasukan dan mereka ditimpa oleh dingin. Ketika mereka kembali kepada Nabi ﷺ, mereka mengadukan apa yang menimpa mereka dari dingin. Beliau memerintahkan mereka untuk mengusap atas pembalut kepala mereka dan alas kaki mereka.'

112.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever prays over a funeral will have a qirat of reward. If he witnesses the burial, he will have two qirats — and the qirat is like mount Uhud.'
112.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa menshalatkan jenazah, maka baginya satu qirat pahala. Jika ia menyaksikan penguburannya, maka baginya dua qirat — dan qirat itu seperti gunung Uhud.'

113.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Who will guarantee me one thing, and I will guarantee him Paradise?' He said: 'I said: I will, O Messenger of Allah.' He said: 'Do not ask people for anything.' So Thawban's whip would fall while he was riding and he would not say to anyone: hand it to me — he would dismount and pick it up himself.
113.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Siapa yang menjamin satu hal untukku, dan aku akan menjamin surga baginya?' Ia berkata: 'Aku berkata: Aku, wahai Rasulullah.' Beliau bersabda: 'Jangan meminta apa pun kepada orang-orang.' Maka cambuk Tsauban jika jatuh saat ia sedang berkuda, ia tidak berkata kepada siapapun: serahkan ia kepadaku — ia turun dan mengambilnya sendiri.'

114.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'A man may be deprived of provision because of a sin he commits. Nothing repels fate except supplication, and nothing increases one's lifespan except righteousness.'
114.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Seseorang bisa terhalang dari rezeki karena dosa yang ia kerjakan. Tidak ada yang menolak takdir kecuali doa, dan tidak ada yang menambah umur kecuali kebaikan.'

115.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When you see the black banners coming from Khurasan, go to them, for among them is the Caliph of Allah, the Mahdi.'
115.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila kalian melihat panji-panji hitam datang dari Khurasan, pergilah kepada mereka, karena di antara mereka ada Khalifah Allah, al-Mahdi.'

116.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Be in harmony with Quraysh as long as they are in harmony with you.'
116.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Teruslah sejalan dengan Quraisy selama mereka sejalan dengan kalian.'

117.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever visits a sick person continues to be in the garden of Paradise.' He was asked: 'What is the garden of Paradise?' He said: 'Its fruit.'
117.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa mengunjungi orang sakit, ia terus berada di taman surga.' Ditanyakan: 'Apakah taman surga itu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Buahnya.'

118.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban, the freed servant of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever's soul departs from his body while he is free of three things will enter Paradise — or Paradise is guaranteed for him: arrogance, treachery, and debt.'
118.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban, bekas budak Rasulullah ﷺ, bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa ruhnya berpisah dari jasadnya sementara ia terbebas dari tiga hal, maka ia akan masuk surga — atau surga dijamin baginya: kesombongan, pengkhianatan, dan hutang.'

119.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ slaughtered a sacrifice for himself and then said to him: 'O Thawban, preserve the meat of this sheep.' He said: 'I continued to feed him from it until he arrived in Madinah.'
119.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyembelih kurban untuk dirinya sendiri kemudian berkata kepadanya: 'Wahai Tsauban, peliharalah daging kambing ini.' Ia berkata: 'Aku terus memberi beliau makan darinya hingga beliau tiba di Madinah.'

120.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ was on a journey when some of his companions said: 'Such has been revealed about gold and silver — if only we knew which wealth is best, we would take it.' He said: 'The best of it is a tongue busy with remembrance, a grateful heart, and a believing wife who helps him in his faith.'
120.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ sedang dalam perjalanan ketika sebagian sahabatnya berkata: 'Telah turun wahyu tentang emas dan perak — seandainya kita mengetahui harta apa yang terbaik, tentu kita akan mengambilnya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Yang terbaik adalah lisan yang sibuk berdzikir, hati yang bersyukur, dan istri yang beriman yang membantu suaminya dalam keimanannya.'

121.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'What I fear most for my nation is misguiding leaders.'
121.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Yang paling aku takutkan bagi umatku adalah para pemimpin yang menyesatkan.'

122.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'What I fear most for my nation is misguiding leaders.'
122.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Yang paling aku takutkan bagi umatku adalah para pemimpin yang menyesatkan.'

123.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Indeed Allah, Mighty and Majestic, gathered up the earth for me — or my Lord gathered up the earth for me — and I saw its east and its west. The dominion of my nation will reach as far as what was gathered up for me. I was given the two treasures — the red and the white. I asked my Lord for my nation that He not destroy them with a drought across the board, and not make an external enemy dominate over them to overwhelm them entirely.'
123.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Allah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Agung menggulungkan bumi untukku — atau Rabbku menggulungkan bumi untukku — dan aku melihat timur dan baratnya. Kekuasaan umatku akan mencapai sejauh apa yang digulungkan untukku. Aku diberikan dua perbendaharaan — yang merah dan yang putih. Aku memohon kepada Rabbku untuk umatku agar Dia tidak membinasakan mereka dengan kekeringan menyeluruh, dan tidak membiarkan musuh dari luar menguasai mereka hingga menghancurkan mereka sepenuhnya.'

124.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban, the freed servant of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Two groups from my nation — Allah has protected them from the Fire: a group that will invade India, and a group that will be with Isa ibn Maryam (peace be upon him).'
124.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban, bekas budak Rasulullah ﷺ, bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Dua kelompok dari umatku — Allah telah melindungi mereka dari neraka: kelompok yang akan menyerbu India, dan kelompok yang akan bersama Isa ibn Maryam alaihissalam.'

125.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said regarding other nations devouring the Muslims: 'You will be many at that time, but you will be like the froth of a flood. Allah will remove fear of you from the hearts of your enemies and cast weakness into your hearts.' He was asked: 'What is this weakness?' He said: 'Love of the worldly life and hatred of death.'
125.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda tentang bangsa-bangsa yang memangsa kaum muslimin: 'Kalian saat itu banyak, tetapi kalian akan seperti buih banjir. Allah akan mencabut rasa takut terhadap kalian dari hati musuh-musuh kalian dan melemparkan kelemahan ke dalam hati kalian.' Ditanyakan: 'Apakah kelemahan itu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Cinta dunia dan benci mati.'

126.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that Fatimah showed a golden chain to Thawban, and the Prophet ﷺ entered and said: 'O Fatimah, is it right that people say that Fatimah the daughter of Muhammad has a chain of fire on her hand?' Then he rebuked her severely and left without sitting.
126.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Fatimah memperlihatkan rantai emas kepada Tsauban, dan Nabi ﷺ masuk dan bersabda: 'Wahai Fatimah, apakah layak orang-orang mengatakan bahwa Fatimah putri Muhammad memakai rantai api di tangannya?' Kemudian beliau menegurnya dengan keras dan keluar tanpa duduk.'

127.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ cursed the one who gives a bribe, the one who receives a bribe, and the intermediary — meaning the one who goes between them.
127.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melaknat orang yang memberi suap, orang yang menerima suap, dan perantaranya — yakni orang yang berjalan di antara keduanya.'

128.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever would like increase in his appointed term and increase in his provision, let him maintain ties of kinship.'
128.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa ingin diperpanjang ajalnya dan ditambah rezekinya, hendaklah ia menyambung silaturahmi.'

129.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Indeed a servant seeks the pleasure of Allah and continues in that, and Allah, Mighty and Majestic, says to Jibril: Verily so-and-so, my servant, seeks to please Me — know that My mercy is upon him. Then Jibril says: The mercy of Allah is upon so-and-so. And the bearers of the Throne say it, and those around them say it, until it is said throughout the heavens, and then it descends to earth.'
129.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya seorang hamba mencari keridhaan Allah dan terus melakukan itu, maka Allah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Agung berfirman kepada Jibril: Sesungguhnya si fulan, hamba-Ku, mencari keridhaan-Ku — ketahuilah bahwa rahmat-Ku tercurah atasnya. Maka Jibril berkata: Rahmat Allah atas si fulan. Dan para pembawa Arsy mengucapkannya, dan orang-orang di sekitar mereka mengucapkannya, hingga diucapkan di seluruh langit, kemudian turun ke bumi.'

130.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Do not harm the servants of Allah, do not insult them, and do not seek out their faults. For whoever seeks out the fault of his Muslim brother, Allah will seek out his fault until He exposes him in his own home.'
130.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah menyakiti hamba-hamba Allah, jangan menghina mereka, dan jangan mencari-cari aib mereka. Karena barangsiapa mencari-cari aib saudaranya yang muslim, Allah akan mencari-cari aibnya hingga Dia mempermalukannya di rumahnya sendiri.'

131.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'A group from my nation will continue upon the truth, prevailing, and those who abandon them will not harm them until the command of Allah, Mighty and Majestic, comes.'
131.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sekelompok dari umatku akan senantiasa berada di atas kebenaran, menang, dan orang-orang yang meninggalkan mereka tidak akan membahayakan mereka hingga datang perintah Allah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Agung.'

132.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The one who visits the sick is in the garden of Paradise.'
132.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang yang mengunjungi orang sakit berada di taman surga.'

133.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Who will guarantee me one thing, and I will guarantee him Paradise?' He said: 'I said: I will, O Messenger of Allah.' He said: 'Do not ask people for anything.' So when Thawban's whip fell while he was riding, he would not tell anyone to hand it to him — he would dismount himself and take it.
133.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Siapa yang menjamin satu hal untukku, dan aku akan menjamin surga baginya?' Ia berkata: 'Aku berkata: Aku, wahai Rasulullah.' Beliau bersabda: 'Jangan meminta apa pun kepada orang-orang.' Maka ketika cambuk Tsauban jatuh saat ia sedang berkuda, ia tidak meminta siapapun untuk mengambilkannya — ia turun sendiri dan mengambilnya.'

134.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The best dinar a man spends is on his family, then on himself, then in the path of Allah, then on his companions in the path of Allah.' Abu Qilabah said: 'And he starts with his family.'
134.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Dinar terbaik yang dinafkahkan seseorang adalah untuk keluarganya, kemudian untuk dirinya sendiri, kemudian di jalan Allah, kemudian untuk teman-temannya di jalan Allah.' Abu Qilabah berkata: 'Dan ia memulai dengan keluarganya.'

135.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When a Muslim visits his Muslim brother, he remains in the garden of Paradise until he returns.'
135.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika seorang muslim mengunjungi saudaranya yang muslim, ia senantiasa berada di taman surga hingga ia kembali.'

136.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, when he wanted to conclude his prayer, would say: 'I seek forgiveness from Allah' three times. Then he would say: 'O Allah, You are Peace and from You comes peace. Blessed are You, O Possessor of majesty and honor.'
136.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ apabila ingin mengakhiri shalatnya, mengucapkan: 'Aku memohon ampun kepada Allah' tiga kali. Kemudian beliau mengucapkan: 'Ya Allah, Engkaulah As-Salam dan dari-Mu lah keselamatan. Maha Suci Engkau wahai Pemilik keagungan dan kemuliaan.'

137.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ described his Hawd (Pool), saying that he would drive the people away from it for the people of Yemen and strike them with his staff until they flowed away from it. It was said to the Prophet ﷺ: 'What is its size?' He said: 'From my standing place to Oman. Two water channels pour into it to supply it.'
137.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ menggambarkan Haudnya (Telaga), mengatakan bahwa beliau akan mengusir orang-orang darinya untuk orang-orang Yaman dan memukul mereka dengan tongkatnya hingga mereka mengalir menjauh. Dikatakan kepada Nabi ﷺ: 'Berapa luasnya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Dari tempatku berdiri hingga Oman. Dua saluran air mengalir ke dalamnya untuk mengisinya.'

138.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed through al-Baqi' on the eighteenth night of Ramadan, and came across a man performing cupping. He said: 'Both the cupper and the one being cupped have broken their fast.'
138.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melewati al-Baqi' pada malam kedelapan belas Ramadan, dan bertemu seorang laki-laki yang sedang membekam. Beliau bersabda: 'Orang yang membekam dan orang yang dibekam keduanya telah membatalkan puasanya.'

139.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban, the freed servant of the Prophet ﷺ, that Ma'dan said to him: 'Tell us a hadith from which Allah will benefit us.' He said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: There is no servant who prostrates to Allah in a single prostration except that Allah raises him one degree by it and removes from him one sin.'
139.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban, bekas budak Nabi ﷺ, bahwa Ma'dan berkata kepadanya: 'Ceritakanlah kepada kami sebuah hadits yang dengannya Allah memberikan manfaat kepada kami.' Ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Tidak ada seorang hamba pun yang sujud kepada Allah dalam satu sujud melainkan Allah mengangkatnya satu derajat dengannya dan menghapus satu dosa darinya.'

140.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever fasts Ramadan — that month counts as ten months. And fasting six days after Eid al-Fitr completes the fasting of the year.'
140.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berpuasa Ramadan — bulan itu setara dengan sepuluh bulan. Dan berpuasa enam hari setelah Idul Fitri menyempurnakan puasa setahun penuh.'

141.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban, the freed servant of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, attributed to the Prophet ﷺ, that he said: 'Nothing repels fate except supplication, and nothing increases one's lifespan except righteousness. Indeed a man may be deprived of provision because of a sin he commits.'
141.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban, bekas budak Rasulullah ﷺ, yang disandarkan kepada Nabi ﷺ, bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Tidak ada yang menolak takdir kecuali doa, dan tidak ada yang menambah umur kecuali kebaikan. Sesungguhnya seseorang bisa terhalang dari rezeki karena dosa yang ia kerjakan.'

142.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Be steadfast and you will succeed. The best of your deeds is prayer, and none will maintain wudu except a believer.'
142.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Istiqamahlah dan kalian akan berhasil. Sebaik-baik amal kalian adalah shalat, dan tidak ada yang menjaga wudu kecuali seorang mukmin.'

143.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'It is not lawful for a Muslim to look inside the house of another person until he has sought permission. If he looks, he has entered. Nor should a man lead a people in prayer and single himself out with a supplication that excludes them — if he does so, he has betrayed them. Nor should a man pray while needing to relieve himself, until he lightens himself.'
143.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak halal bagi seorang muslim untuk mengintip ke dalam rumah orang lain sampai ia meminta izin. Jika ia mengintip, maka ia telah masuk. Dan seorang laki-laki tidak boleh mengimami suatu kaum dalam shalat lalu mengkhususkan dirinya dengan doa yang mengecualikan mereka — jika ia melakukan itu, maka ia telah mengkhianati mereka. Dan seorang laki-laki tidak boleh shalat dalam keadaan menahan buang air besar, hingga ia meringankan dirinya.'

144.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'For every act of forgetfulness in prayer there are two prostrations after the taslim.'
144.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Untuk setiap kelalaian dalam shalat terdapat dua sujud setelah salam.'

145.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was ill in Homs and Abdullah ibn Qurt al-Azdi was its governor, and he did not visit him. A man entered upon Thawban and Thawban wrote a letter, saying: 'If a slave of yours were ill in your presence, you would have visited him.' He folded the letter and said: 'Will you deliver it to him?' He said yes. When Ibn Qurt read it, he rose in alarm. The people said: 'What is wrong with him?' He went to Thawban, entered, visited him, and sat with him for a time.
145.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia sakit di Homs dan Abdullah ibn Qurt al-Azdi adalah gubernurnya, dan ia tidak mengunjunginya. Seorang laki-laki masuk menemui Tsauban dan Tsauban menulis surat, berkata: 'Seandainya seorang budakmu sakit di hadapanmu, tentu kamu akan mengunjunginya.' Ia melipat surat itu dan berkata: 'Maukah kamu menyampaikannya kepadanya?' Ia berkata ya. Ketika Ibn Qurt membacanya, ia bangkit dengan terkejut. Orang-orang berkata: 'Ada apa dengannya?' Ia pergi kepada Tsauban, masuk, mengunjunginya, dan duduk bersamanya sejenak.'

146.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ perform wudu and wipe over his leather socks, and over the khimar, then the turban.'
146.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ berwudu dan mengusap atas kedua khuf-nya, dan atas khimar, kemudian sorban.'

147.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever asks when he has no need — it will be a mark on his face on the Day of Resurrection.'
147.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa meminta padahal ia tidak membutuhkan — itu akan menjadi bekas di wajahnya pada Hari Kiamat.'

148.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban, the freed servant of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ slaughtered a sacrifice and then said to him: 'O Thawban, preserve the meat of this sheep.' He said: 'I continued to feed him from it until he arrived in Madinah.'
148.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban, bekas budak Rasulullah ﷺ, bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyembelih kurban kemudian berkata kepadanya: 'Wahai Tsauban, peliharalah daging kambing ini.' Ia berkata: 'Aku terus memberi beliau makan darinya hingga beliau tiba di Madinah.'

149.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever visits a sick person remains in the garden of Paradise.' It was asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, what is the garden of Paradise?' He said: 'Its fruit.'
149.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa mengunjungi orang sakit, ia senantiasa berada di taman surga.' Ditanyakan: 'Wahai Rasulullah, apakah taman surga itu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Buahnya.'

150.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that his whip fell while he was riding his camel and he did not ask anyone to hand it to him — he dismounted and retrieved it. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Who will guarantee me one thing and I will guarantee him Paradise?' Thawban replied and was told not to ask people for anything.
150.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa cambuknya jatuh saat ia sedang mengendarai untanya dan ia tidak meminta siapapun untuk mengambilkannya — ia turun dan mengambilnya sendiri. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Siapa yang menjamin satu hal untukku dan aku akan menjamin surga baginya?' Tsauban menjawab dan diperintahkan untuk tidak meminta apa pun kepada orang-orang.'
